last_agent_action: Upgraded the target-generated playbooks into an enterprise-style live diagnostic webpage with symptom navigation, FireFlow operator language, step cards, command panels, and a reviewable forwarded URL.
resume_instructions: Read the objective, backlog, and work-state files before editing code.
Start the next cycle by reviewing the live target-generated webpage and tuning the wording for FireFlow Backend and Microservice Platform first.
Restage the build-pack to the saved AlgoSec lab target before the next remote Codex run that changes playbook logic.
Keep machine-readable artifacts canonical, keep HTML as a thin render layer, and keep new commands read-only.
Use the saved lab target request and current temporary review path as the baseline operator-review loop.
stop_conditions: Stop when the current operator-review slice is captured cleanly and the next work items are recorded in pack-local state.
Stop and escalate if the next action would require changing registry, deployment pointer, or promotion state directly.
